creator: sandeep.zlato@gmail.com
text:
Thank you so much as you have been willing to share information with us. We will forever admire all you have done here because you have made my work as easy as ABC. But do you know about the “Bellsouth email SMTP server settings” issue? No? This will help you.

https://www.usatechblog.com/blog/bellsouth-email-settings/
